name: playstore_reply_review
description: Post a public developer reply to a Google Play user review, or edit the existing reply. This is a write action: the reply is visible to users on the store listing. Each review has a single developer reply, so replying again replaces it. Reply text is limited to 350 characters.

packageName.description: The Android package name of the app (e.g., com.example.myapp)

reviewId.description: The ID of the review to reply to (from playstore_reviews)

replyText.description: The reply text, posted publicly as the developer reply (max 350 characters)
